Off Calendar Nov-15-2021 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Settlement
Off Calendar Oct-18-2021 Continued To Nov-15-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To 1) Compel Trust Distribution Including In Kind Distribution Of Real Properties And Court Confirmation Of Any Sale Of Real Property 2) For Breach Of Trust And Breach Of Fiduciary Duty By Respondent Dana Trustee 3) For A Verified Accounting And Report 4) To Remove Trustee For Breach Of Trust And Breach Of Fiduciary Duty And Appoint Successor Trustees Or Professional Fiduciary 5) For An Award Of Petitioner'S Attorneys' Fees And Costs And Denial Of Trustee Fees And Trustee'S Attorney'S
Off Calendar Oct-18-2021 Continued To Nov-15-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To 1) Compel Trust Distribution Including In Kind Distribution Of Real Properties And Court Confirmation Of Any Sale Of Real Property 2) For Breach Of Trust And Breach Of Fiduciary Duty By Respondent Dana Trustee 3) For A Verified Accounting And Report 4) To Remove Trustee For Breach Of Trust And Breach Of Fiduciary Duty And Appoint Successor Trustees Or Professional Fiduciary 5) For An Award Of Petitioner'S Attorneys' Fees And Costs And Denial Of Trustee Fees And Trustee'S Attorney'S
Off Calendar Jun-21-2021 Continued To Oct-18-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Richard Franceschini, via ZOOM, for David Goldfein, Petitioner; Anthony Dutra, via ZOOM, for Dana Malloy, Trustee.

The court at the outset queries counsel as to the status of mediation. Mr. Dutra reports that the parties participated in a full-day mediation with no resolution and there have been no subsequent discussions. The court then confirms with counsel that there is a trial set in August RE a partition matter. Mr. Franceschini suggests a continuance of this matter for 30-60 days after the trial. Mr. Dutra agrees.

The Petition to Compel Trust Distribution, etc., is continued to October 18, 2021, at 9:00 am in Department 204. A Status of Settlement is also added for the same date, time, and location.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Neves. Not reported.

Petition To 1) Compel Trust Distribution Including In Kind Distribution Of Real Properties And Court Confirmation Of Any Sale Of Real Property 2) For Breach Of Trust And Breach Of Fiduciary Duty By Respondent Dana Trustee 3) For A Verified Accounting And Report 4) To Remove Trustee For Breach Of Trust And Breach Of Fiduciary Duty And Appoint Successor Trustees Or Professional Fiduciary 5) For An Award Of Petitioner'S Attorneys' Fees And Costs And Denial Of Trustee Fees And Trustee'S Attorney'S
Off Calendar May-26-2021 Continued To Jun-21-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To 1) Compel Trust Distribution Including In Kind Distribution Of Real Properties And Court Confirmation Of Any Sale Of Real Property 2) For Breach Of Trust And Breach Of Fiduciary Duty By Respondent Dana Trustee 3) For A Verified Accounting And Report 4) To Remove Trustee For Breach Of Trust And Breach Of Fiduciary Duty And Appoint Successor Trustees Or Professional Fiduciary 5) For An Award Of Petitioner'S Attorneys' Fees And Costs And Denial Of Trustee Fees And Trustee'S Attorney'S
Off Calendar Mar-03-2021 Continued To May-26-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Paul Gruwell via Zoom for Petitioner, David Goldfein.
Anthony Dutra via Court Call for Dana Malloy.

The court noted that Mr. Gruwell is a new addition to the case and that the partition action is set for a trial date of May 24th. Mr. Gruwell requested 60-90 days continuance for parties to mediate in this action and the partition action. Mr. Dutra stated that the agrees with Mr. Gruwell.

The first amended petition to compel trust distribution, etc. is continued to May 26, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Parties to file a joint statement on mediation one week prior to the hearing date indicating whether mediation was successful.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: S. Le. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
